name: RMX / FXX Drift Chassis
description: Build manuals for MST's RWD drift chassis - the RMX line (2.5, 3.0, EX, 4) plus FXX and FRX.
notes: Reference card: a chassis kit, not software. MST publishes no PC software of any kind. These deliberately link the per-model SUPPORT PAGES rather than the PDFs: MST serves manuals from opaque upload-timestamp filenames (e.g. 202604080832442a.pdf) that change without notice, whereas the class_sn URLs are stable. Manuals are EN/CN bilingual diagrams.
